prompt: How do you configure a Scheduled Job to execute on the last day of every month?
choices: Set the Run field to Monthly and the Day field to Last Day
Set the Run field to Periodically and the Repeat Interval to 31
Set the Run field to Daily and the Time to 23:59
Set the Run field to Weekly and the Day to Sunday
explanation: A Scheduled Job with Run = Monthly and Day = Last Day executes on the final day of each month regardless of month length.

prompt: What is the purpose of an Application Property (System Property scoped to an app)?
choices: To store a configurable value that scripts read at runtime without hard-coding it
To define the table's primary key
To grant the admin role to all users
To render the login page
explanation: Application properties store configurable values (read via gs.getProperty) so behavior can change without editing code.

prompt: Which server-side method reads the value of a system property in a script?
choices: gs.getProperty('property.name')
g_form.getValue('property.name')
current.getProperty('property.name')
gs.eventQueue('property.name')
explanation: gs.getProperty() retrieves the string value of a system (application) property at runtime.

prompt: How do you register a custom event so business logic and notifications can respond to it?
choices: Create an entry in the Event Registry and fire it with gs.eventQueue()
Add the event name to a UI Policy
Store the event in an attachment field
Define the event as a dictionary column
explanation: Custom events are declared in the Event Registry and triggered with gs.eventQueue(); script actions and notifications can subscribe to them.

prompt: Which components make up a Flow Designer flow? (Choose two.)
choices: A trigger that starts the flow
Actions that perform steps
An import set transform map
A dictionary override
explanation: A flow is composed of a trigger (record, schedule, etc.) and one or more actions/steps that execute the automation logic.
